title: Anatomy of a Probability Vector
description: A visual decomposition of a probability vector, showing its components, properties, and its role in defining a state within a Markov Chain.
elements: A vector (v) with n elements: [p₁, p₂, ..., pₙ]
Current state in a Markov Chain
relationships: Each element pᵢ in the vector v represents the probability of being in state sᵢ
The sum of all elements p₁ + p₂ + ... + pₙ must equal 1
The vector v defines the probability distribution over the entire state space S at a given time
This vector is the state vector for the current step in a Markov Chain
